## Welcome to Hyderabad Dental Hospital

we provide dental treatment for existing problems to a high standard, then work with you on a preventive approach that keeps you smiling for life. We want, as much as you, to avoid reparative treatment, and the anxieties that go with it, so we place great importance on our role in helping you to prevent problems in the first place.

We offer a wide range of dental services, from routine dental and hygienist care to a comprehensive range of advanced services including implants, 3D Guided Implants, Correction Root Canals, Teeth Whitening, Cosmetic Dentistry

## Highly Quality Dental Care

At the Hyderabad Dental Hospital, we have a spacial team of
Doctors and support staff to provide a service that is designed to meet the needs of all our patients.

##### [Dr. Vijay Reddy](http://www.hyderabaddentalhospitals.com/\#)

Dr. Vijay Reddy is a Faciomaxillary Surgeon, Trauma and Reconstructive facial surgery. Having done his masters program in India he obtained two fellow-ships from the Royal college of surgeons of England and USA. He got intensive training in Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery in USA in various hospitals and worked at the Prestigeous Boston Medical Centre, Boston, USA.

[Meet Doctor](http://www.hyderabaddentalhospitals.com/#)

![image](http://www.hyderabaddentalhospitals.com/assets/images/online-network-2.jpg)

##### [Dr. Nirmitha Reddy](http://www.hyderabaddentalhospitals.com/\#)

![image](http://www.hyderabaddentalhospitals.com/assets/images/nirmitha.jpg)

## Dr. Nirmitha Reddy

Dr. Nirmitha Reddy is a general and cosmetic dental surgeon, having her spaciality done in aesthetic(cosmetic) dentisty from MANIPAL DENTAL COLLEGE

##### [Words from the Doctor](http://www.hyderabaddentalhospitals.com/\#)

General and cosmetic dentisty is my passion. As a Cosmetic Dentist I enjoy helping people. I feel that creating a beautful smile communicates to others that we are friendly, confident and interesting. There is noting I love more than helping my patients restore confidence in their smiles. The value of a healthy smile is priceless, which is why I love using cosmetic dentistry to help my patients look and feel their best. I realize that a gorgeous smile is the best accessory that anyone can have. Having a confident smile is a powerful thing. It affects how you show up in your personal and perfessional relationships every single day.

85%

Recover from treatment
